# Devotion Files

Place daily devotion texts here following this structure:

    devotions/
      YYYY/
        MM-DD.txt       ← preferred (e.g. 2026/03-28.txt)
      YYYY-MM-DD.txt    ← flat alternative
      today.txt         ← catch-all override (checked last)

## Format

Each file is plain text — the entire contents are sent verbatim to each AI instance.
Structure however suits your formation practice. A suggested template:

---
FEAST / ORDINARY TIME: [Day, e.g. Saturday of the Fourth Week of Lent]
DATE: 2026-03-28

SCRIPTURE (Lectio Divina):
[Passage — e.g. John 7:40-53]

LECTIO (Read):
[Full or abbreviated text of the passage]

MEDITATIO (Meditate):
[Key phrase or word to dwell on]

ORATIO (Prayer):
[Your prayer arising from the text]

CONTEMPLATIO (Rest):
[An invitation to silence — or a brief closing reflection]

ROSARY INTENTION:
[Today's mystery and your specific intention]

SPIRITUAL COMMUNION:
My Jesus, I believe that You are present in the Most Holy Sacrament.
I love You above all things, and I desire to receive You into my soul.
Since I cannot at this moment receive You sacramentally, come at least
spiritually into my heart. I embrace You as if You were already there
and unite myself wholly to You. Never permit me to be separated from You.
Amen.
---

## Notes

- The sender adds no wrapper text — what you write is exactly what each instance receives.
- You can include formation questions at the end to prompt reflection from each AI.
- Files are UTF-8 encoded plain text (.txt). No formatting required.
